rows.text:
A jury found Francisco Frias-Abalos, of Mexico, guilty of indecent assault. The court sentenced him to 200 days confinement, but his sentence was suspended. He ended up on probation and ordered to have no contact with a specific woman, who soon after filed a protective order against him.

ICE @ERODallas Fugitive Operations arrested him at-large during a targeted immigration enforcement action. 

He’s now in ICE detention and going through removal proceedings based on:

⚖️ INA 212(a)(6)(A): Alien present without admission or parole

⚖️A 2024 Georgia state law prohibits all local governments from creating sanctuary policies. In other words, Gwinnett County honors ICE detainers, so Rodriguez Flores will not be released into the community before he faces justice.

rows.text:
CLAIM: ICE personnel at Delaney Hall have physically attacked detainees, including with the use of pepper spray.

FACT: No detainees were beaten or attacked by ICE. On May 28, 2026, staff responded to a physical fight involving detainees at Delaney Hall. In accordance with established ICE policies and their training, staff used the minimum amount of force to safely deescalate the situation. Following the incident, all affected detainees were promptly evaluated by on-site medical personnel and were cleared with no serious injuries.
rows.text_resolved:
CLAIM: ICE personnel at Delaney Hall have physically attacked detainees, including with the use of pepper spray.

FACT: No detainees were beaten or attacked by ICE. On May 28, 2026, staff responded to a physical fight involving detainees at Delaney Hall. In accordance with established ICE policies and their training, staff used the minimum amount of force to safely deescalate the situation. Following the incident, all affected detainees were promptly evaluated by on-site medical personnel and were cleared with no serious injuries.

author.description: With honor and integrity, we will safeguard the American people, our homeland, and our values. #WeAreDHS

rows.text:
CLAIM: Protesters at Delaney Hall, including U.S. Senator Andy Kim, were shot with pepper balls.

FACT: No individuals were directly struck by pepper ball projectiles. On May 25, 2026, rioters obstructed law enforcement from exiting the ICE facility. Officers issued multiple lawful verbal commands for rioters to clear the area. Rioters refused to follow law enforcement commands and continue to obstruct the exit route. Our law enforcement followed their training and used the minimum amount of force necessary to protect themselves, the public, and federal property.

rows.text:
Update on the tragic bus crash in Virginia: 

Five people are dead, including a 13-year-old girl and a 7-year-old boy, after the driver of a motorcoach slammed into stopped traffic on I-95. 

@FMCSA Administrator Derek Barrs and our investigators are on the ground at the crash site working with the @NTSB.  

Local police confirm the driver of this motorcoach — a man from China who became a U.S. citizen — doesn’t speak English. He received his commercial drivers license from New York State in 2024. 

Unacceptable. This is exactly why we are holding states’ accountable, enforcing the rules of the road, and cracking down on drivers who can’t speak English.

If you can’t be properly trained, read our road signs, or communicate with law enforcement, you have no business driving a bus. 

Our investigators are reviewing New York licensing records, training documentation, and the driver's history. Any company, trainer, or school that contributed to putting an unqualified driver on the road will face intense scrutiny.

We’ll share more updates soon. 

My prayers are with the loved ones of the innocent lives lost and those who were hurt in this horrific crime.
rows.text_resolved:
